mapper.select: /* getLoadingOrderPLT */ select ROW_NUMBER() OVER(partition by TI.SAATC06 order by TI.COMPKEY, TI.VHPLNKY, TI.SAATC06, TI.SAATC10, TH.POSTDAT, TI.WAREKEY) as ROWNUM , concat('PLT#', LPAD(DENSE_RANK() OVER(ORDER BY TI.COMPKEY, TI.VHPLNKY, TI.SAATC06), 2, '0')) AS PLTNUM , TI.COMPKEY , SUBT.ITEMCNT , SUBT2.PLTCNT , TI.VHPLNKY , Fn_com_todate(TH.POSTDAT) as POSTDAT , date_format(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as PRINTDAY , MW.WHNAMLC as WAREKEY , TV.VHCFNAM , TI.SAATC06 , TI.SAATC08 , TI.SAATC07 , TI.SAATC10 , TI.SAATC01 , TI.SAATC05 , TI.SAATC03 , TI.TRITQTY , TI.SUOMKEY , TI.SKUMKEY , MS.SKUDESC from TPLNIT TI inner join ( select count(T.SAATC06) as ITEMCNT, T.SAATC06, T.COMPKEY, T.VHPLNKY from TPLNIT T where T.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and T.VHPLNKY = #{vhplnky} group by T.SAATC06 ) SUBT on SUBT.SAATC06 = TI.SAATC06 and SUBT.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and SUBT.VHPLNKY = TI.VHPLNKY inner join ( select count(DISTINCT T.SAATC06) as PLTCNT, T.COMPKEY, T.VHPLNKY from TPLNIT T where T.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and T.VHPLNKY = #{vhplnky} group by T.COMPKEY, T.VHPLNKY ) SUBT2 on SUBT2.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and SUBT2.VHPLNKY = TI.VHPLNKY inner join TPLNHD TH on TH.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and TH.VHPLNKY = TI.VHPLNKY left outer join MWARMA MW on MW.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and MW.WAREKEY = TI.WAREKEY left outer join TVHCMA TV on TV.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and TV.WAREKEY = TI.WAREKEY and TV.VEHICKY = TH.VEHICKY left outer join MSKUWC MS on MS.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and MS.WAREKEY = TI.WAREKEY and MS.OWNERKY = TI.OWNERKY and MS.SKUMKEY = TI.SKUMKEY where TI.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and TI.VHPLNKY = #{vhplnky} order by TI.COMPKEY, TI.VHPLNKY, TI.SAATC06, TI.SAATC10, TH.POSTDAT, TI.WAREKEY

/* getLoadingOrderITEM */ select ROW_NUMBER() OVER(order by TI.COMPKEY, TI.VHPLNKY, TI.SAATC10, TI.SAATC06, TI.SKUMKEY) as ROWNUM , TI.COMPKEY , TI.VHPLNKY , date_format(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as PRINTDAY , Fn_com_todate(TH.POSTDAT) as POSTDAT , TI.SAATC10 , TI.SAATC01 , TI.SAATC05 , TI.SAATC03 , TI.SKUMKEY , MS.SKUDESC , TI.TRITQTY , TI.SUOMKEY , TI.SAATC06 , MW.WHNAMLC as WAREKEY , TV.VHCFNAM , SUBT2.PLTCNT , SUBT.ITEMCNT from TPLNIT TI left outer join MSKUWC MS on MS.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and MS.WAREKEY = TI.WAREKEY and MS.OWNERKY = TI.OWNERKY and MS.SKUMKEY = TI.SKUMKEY inner join ( select count(T.VHPLNIT) as ITEMCNT, T.COMPKEY, T.VHPLNKY from TPLNIT T WHERE T.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and T.VHPLNKY = #{vhplnky} ) SUBT on SUBT.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and SUBT.VHPLNKY = TI.VHPLNKY inner join ( select count(DISTINCT T.SAATC06) as PLTCNT, T.COMPKEY, T.VHPLNKY from TPLNIT T where T.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and T.VHPLNKY = #{vhplnky} group by T.COMPKEY, T.VHPLNKY ) SUBT2 on SUBT2.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and SUBT2.VHPLNKY = TI.VHPLNKY inner join TPLNHD TH on TH.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and TH.VHPLNKY = TI.VHPLNKY left outer join MWARMA MW on MW.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and MW.WAREKEY = TI.WAREKEY left outer join TVHCMA TV on TV.COMPKEY = TI.COMPKEY and TV.WAREKEY = TI.WAREKEY and TV.VEHICKY = TH.VEHICKY where TI.COMPKEY = #{compkey} and TI.VHPLNKY = #{vhplnky} order by TI.COMPKEY, TI.VHPLNKY, TI.SAATC10, TI.SAATC06, TI.SKUMKEY
